monthly_subtitle: Tap any day to view the full prayer times.
manual_location_message: Please allow location access to load prayer times for your current area.
notifications_status_unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
notifications_status_location_required: Location access is required before Minaret reminders can be enabled.
notifications_status_denied: iPhone notifications are currently off. Re-enable them in Settings, then return to Minaret.
notifications_status_enabled: Minaret reminders are active for the selected prayers.
notifications_status_enabled_empty: Minaret reminders are active, but no prayers are selected.
notifications_status_disabled: Minaret reminders are currently turned off.
notifications_open_settings_action: How to enable in iPhone settings
notifications_status_permission_needed: Allow iPhone notifications first, then Minaret can subscribe this device for prayer reminders.
notifications_status_system_allowed: iPhone notifications are already allowed. Enable Minaret reminders when you are ready.
notifications_settings_help_message: To turn iPhone notifications back on: open Settings > Notifications > Minaret, allow notifications, then return to the app.
